name: context7-mcp
tagline: Sibling Context7 skill: resolve-library-id/query-docs workflow for fetching current library and framework documentation.
verdict: No security issues found -- read-only documentation lookups with clear match-selection criteria. Gaps versus its context7-docs sibling: no secret-safety warning, no failure-path guidance (auth errors, no-match results), no negative triggers, and no versioning signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or exclusion guidance, despite scope overlap with generic search and other Context7 skill variants.
No failure-path guidance anywhere: auth errors, no-match results, or tool unavailability are all unaddressed.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
